color: light-dark(rgb(0, 0, 0), rgb(255, 255, 255));">[ HOST ] NVIDIA Jetson Orin NX 16GB&nbsp; (예: 192.168.1.100)</b></div>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="280" width="490" x="110" y="90" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="3" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;" value="<div style=""><span style="background-color: transparent; color: light-dark(rgb(0, 0, 0), rgb(255, 255, 255));"><b>[ CONTAINER ]</b></span></div><div style=""><span style="background-color: transparent; color: light-dark(rgb(0, 0, 0), rgb(255, 255, 255));"><br></span></div><div style=""><span style="background-color: transparent; color: light-dark(rgb(0, 0, 0), rgb(255, 255, 255));">MediaMTX</span></div><div style="">: 8888 (HLS)</div><div style="text-align: justify;"><br></div><div style="text-align: justify;">- 라이브 영상</div><div style="text-align: justify;"><br></div><div style="text-align: justify;"><br></div><div style="text-align: justify;"><br></div>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="180" width="130" x="140" y="120" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="4" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;" value="<div style=""><b>[ CONTAINER ]</b></div><div style=""><br></div><div style="">App</div><div style="">: 8080</div><div style="text-align: justify;"><br></div><div style="text-align: justify;">- 시스템 상태</div><div style="text-align: justify;">- MJPEG</div><div style="text-align: justify;">- 프롬프트</div><div style="text-align: justify;">- PTZ 제어</div>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="180" width="130" x="290" y="120" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="5" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;" value="<div style=""><b>[ CONTAINER ]</b></div><div style=""><br></div><div style="">API Server</div><div style="">: 8000</div><div style="text-align: justify;"><br></div><div style="text-align: justify;">- 클립 CRUD</div><div style="text-align: justify;">- 이벤트 이력</div><div style="text-align: justify;">- 기기 토큰</div><div style="text-align: justify;"><br></div>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="180" width="130" x="440" y="120" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="6" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;" value="<div style=""><b>[ Docker Engine ]</b></div>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="430" x="140" y="310" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>
